title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the some values, Save EQ, dialog present, click OK
scenario: Save EQ dialog does not dismiss after clicking OK when using Custom EQ with changed values
steps: Open the audio settings and select Custom EQ.
Change some EQ values (e.g., adjust sliders or frequency bands).
Click the 'OK' button on the dialog.
expected: The EQ settings are saved successfully and the dialog is dismissed.
